info.name: Postman Monitors API
info.description:
The Postman Monitors API enables you to create and manage monitors that run
collections on a schedule. Monitors run collection requests at specified
intervals and provide notifications when tests fail, enabling continuous
API testing and monitoring.

## Authentication
All requests require an API key passed in the `x-api-key` header.

## Rate Limits
Monitor usage limits vary by plan. Free plans include 1,000 monitoring
API calls per month.


Contact Support:
 Name: Postman Developer Support
 Email: help@postman.com

variable.description: (Required) The monitor's unique ID or UID.

request.description: Manually triggers a monitor run. The response includes the run results with test pass/fail status, response times, and any errors.

response.name: Successful monitor run with results

query.description: The workspace ID to create the monitor in.

request.description: Creates a new monitor that runs a collection on a specified schedule. You must specify the collection to run, the environment to use, and the schedule (cron expression or interval).

response.name: Successfully created monitor
